name: Diamond Head Summit
tagline: Oahu's most iconic crater climb — tunnels, stairs, and 360-degree views that justify the hype.
bestTime: Sunrise — book the 6am slot weeks in advance; it sells out
insiderTips: Reservations required at gostateparks.hawaii.gov — walk-ups are turned away. Bring a flashlight for the dark tunnel sections. About 1.6 miles round trip with 560 ft elevation gain and steep stairs near the top. Bring water — no shade. The 6am sunrise slot is magical but the 6:30am is nearly as good with shorter lines.
kamaaina: Hawaii residents free entry with valid state ID; $5 parking (vs $10 non-resident)
